controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a system of checks and balances to ensure that coins are distributed to retail customers in small lots and not to bulk customers
controls.control_description:
Banks may put in place a system of
checks and balances to ensure that coins are distributed to retail customers in small lots and not to bulk customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a system of checks and balances to ensure that coins are distributed to retail customers in small lots and not to bulk customers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be verified by rbi regional offices through inspection of currency chest / incognito visits to branches etc
controls.control_description:
The distribution of coins shall be
verified by RBI Regional Offices through inspection of currency chest / incognito visits to branches etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be verified by rbi regional offices through inspection of currency chest / incognito visits to branches etc

controls.control_description: No separate claim is required to be made.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to be made

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit their annual plans containing the details of the machines and the cost, to our issue offices latest by april 15 of every year on an ongoing bas
controls.control_description:
3.2 Incentives for installation of machines
i) The banks intending to purchase various machines as also establish currency chests during the period from July 01st to June 30th of a year, may submit their Annual Plans containing the details of the machines and the cost, to our Issue Offices latest by April 15 of every year on an ongoing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit their annual plans containing the details of the machines and the cost, to our issue offices latest by april 15 of every year on an ongoing bas

controls.control_objective: To ensure advise the maximum amount of reimbursement permissible to each bank for that year
controls.control_description: Our Issue offices, on receipt of the plans, may advise the maximum amount of reimbursement permissible to each bank for that year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to advise the maximum amount of reimbursement permissible to each bank for that year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted to the respective issue office of rbi on quarterly basis within 30 days from the close of the respective quarter through the link office
controls.control_description:
Withdrawn
ii) The claims for incentives for installation of Cash Recyclers and ATMs dispensing lower denomination notes should be submitted to the respective Issue Office of RBI on quarterly basis within 30 days from the close of the respective quarter through the Link Office of the bank concerned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted to the respective issue office of rbi on quarterly basis within 30 days from the close of the respective quarter through the link office

controls.control_objective: To ensure however be submitted only after full payment is made to the vendors for the machines
controls.control_description: Such claims may however be submitted only after full payment is made to the vendors for the machines.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to however be submitted only after full payment is made to the vendors for the machines
